## Checklist

- [ ] `/deft:change <name>` — proposed and confirmed before implementation (or N/A for <3 file changes; for solo projects, N/A only if not cross-cutting, architectural, or high-risk)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` — added entry under `[Unreleased]` (or N/A for test-only / CI-only changes)
- [ ] `ROADMAP.md` — updated if this closes a tracked issue (or N/A)
- [ ] Tests pass locally
